name: Notice.AAA6.DefResponse.MoreTimeRequested.JR.Cancelled.Claimant
titleCy: Mae’r CCJ wedi cael ei ganslo
descriptionEn: The defendant has been granted an extension of time to respond to the claim. The CCJ you requested has been cancelled.
descriptionCy: Mae'r diffynnydd wedi cael estyniad amser i ymateb i'r hawliad. Mae'r CCJ y gwnaethoch ofyn amdano wedi'i ganslo.
